messages.text:
What it is: Retire the PWA recert view and BL-339's now-dead deep-link notify (the RETIRE half of the full move to Telegram)
How it works: The phone PWA no longer presents a recert view or its verbs

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-451 - Retire the PWA recert view and BL-339's now-dead deep-link notify (the RETIRE half of the full move to Telegram) is complete.
